crons.comment: Generate 1 article every 2 days at 07:00 Madrid (05:00 UTC)
Weekly keyword research — every Monday 09:00 UTC
Weekly competitor analysis — every Tuesday 10:00 UTC
Daily SEO audit of published articles — 08:00 UTC

src/app/api/cron/generate-article/route..comment: 5 min max — article generation + image generation takes time
